{{CargoRelic
|name=Four Architecture Books
|class_id=22897
|rank=SS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The Four Books of Architecture is a classic of architectural theory, created by Renaissance Italian architect Andrea Palladio. The book is divided into four parts: the first book introduces the basic techniques and principles of architecture, including the five classical orders, building materials, room arrangements, and the construction of various parts of buildings; the second book discusses residential building design, combining Palladio's own design cases to demonstrate how to balance ancient examples with contemporary needs; the third book covers public facilities and buildings, such as streets, bridges, and squares; the fourth book focuses on ancient temples in the Roman region. This work is not only a set of theoretical rules but also a practical manual, having a profound impact on the European architectural world of the 18th century.
|fame=61
|art=45
|fth=82
|civ=54
|tech=105
|ss1=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +4%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +2%<br>Per 10 Home Facility LVLs, Snail ATK +4<br>Home Facility LVL: 100/100
|ss2=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +3%<br>Per 10 Home Facility LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Home Facility LVL: 100/100
|ss3=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +8%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +4%<br>Per 10 Home Facility LVLs, Snail ATK +8<br>Home Facility LVL: 100/100
|ss4=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +12%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +6%<br>Per 10 Home Facility LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Home Facility LVL: 100/100
|ss5=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +16%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +8%<br>Per 10 Home Facility LVLs, Snail ATK +16<br>Home Facility LVL: 100/100
|ss6=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +22%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +11%<br>Per 10 Home Facility LVLs, Snail ATK +22<br>Home Facility LVL: 100/100
|ss7=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +22%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +11%<br>Per 10 Home Facility LVLs, Snail ATK +22<br>Home Facility LVL: 100/100<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +10% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Quary skill III.png|50px]]Place in Quarry: Stone Output +30%
|skill2=[[File:Lumbercamp skill III.png|50px]]Place in Lumber Camp: Find Ancient Wood by +30%
|skill3=[[File:Lumbercamp skill III.png|50px]]Place in Lumber Camp: Wood Output +30%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Architectural Art|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Travel Speedup, +28800|orange}}
|3name=Pillar|3rec=3.81M|3atk=48517|3defense=32005|3hp=670303|3weak=11302
|4name=Arch Bridge|4rec=8.62M|4atk=76099|4defense=50200|4hp=1446015|4weak=15030
|5name=Temple|5rec=17.82M|5atk=112071|5defense=73930|5hp=2801035|5weak=19195
|Arec=42.35M|Aatk=156869|Adefense=103481|Ahp=5182741|Aweak=25763
}}}}
